# dots

`dots` provides tools to make dot density maps.

## Installation

You can install the stable version of `dots` from CRAN with:

``` r

install.packages('dots')
```

You can install the development version of `dots` from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

remotes::install_github('christopherkenny/dots')
```

## Example

The main function in `dots` is
[`dots()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/dots.md).

``` r

library(dots)
library(sf)
#> Linking to GEOS 3.13.1, GDAL 3.11.0, PROJ 9.6.0; sf_use_s2() is TRUE
library(ggplot2)
data('suffolk')
dots::dots(suffolk, c(pop_black, pop_white), divisor = 1000, engine = engine_sf_random) + 
  scale_color_viridis_d() + 
  theme_void()
```

![](reference/figures/README-example-1.png)

You can also use
[`dots_points()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/dots_points.md)
to only make the randomized points.

``` r

dots::dots_points(suffolk, c(pop_black, pop_white), divisor = 1000, engine = engine_sf_random) |> 
  ggplot() + 
  geom_sf(data = suffolk) + 
  geom_sf(aes(color = dots_type)) + 
  scale_color_viridis_d() + 
  theme_void()
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-2-1.png)

# Package index

## Make Dot Density Maps

Major functions to create ggplots or sf points

- [`dots()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/dots.md) : Make
  dot density plots
- [`dots_points()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/dots_points.md)
  : Make dot density points

## Dot Engines

Backends to generate spatial points

- [`engine_sf_hexagonal()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/engine_sf_hexagonal.md)
  :

  Generate Hexagonal Points with `sf`

- [`engine_sf_random()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/engine_sf_random.md)
  :

  Generate Random Points with `sf`

- [`engine_sf_regular()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/engine_sf_regular.md)
  :

  Generate Regular Points with `sf`

- [`engine_sp_clustered()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/engine_sp_clustered.md)
  :

  Generate Clustered Points with `sp`

- [`engine_sp_hexagonal()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/engine_sp_hexagonal.md)
  :

  Generate Hexagonal Points with `sp`

- [`engine_sp_nonaligned()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/engine_sp_nonaligned.md)
  :

  Generate Nonaligned Points with `sp`

- [`engine_sp_random()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/engine_sp_random.md)
  :

  Generate Random Points with `sp`

- [`engine_sp_regular()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/engine_sp_regular.md)
  :

  Generate Regular Points with `sp`

- [`engine_sp_stratified()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/engine_sp_stratified.md)
  :

  Generate Stratified Points with `sp`

- [`engine_terra()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/engine_terra.md)
  :

  Generate Points with `terra`

## Other functions and data

Other useful tools and bits of example data

- [`suffolk`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/suffolk.md) :
  Suffolk County, MA Voting Districts
- [`boston_water`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/boston_water.md)
  : Boston Water
- [`clip_water()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/clip_water.md)
  : Remove Water
- [`filter_pts()`](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/reference/filter_pts.md)
  : Filter Points to a Region

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Making Dot Density
  Maps](http://christophertkenny.com/dots/articles/making_dot_density_maps.md):
